title: CarettaConflictRecord
description: Structured conflict record emitted by the disagreement-surfacing synthesis mode when two or more agent assessments on the same artifact diverge beyond the configured threshold. Stored as a JSON comment <!-- caretta:conflict_record {...} --> in the synthesis artifact body. Produced alongside the merged summary when --surface-disagreements is active.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the conflict record was produced.

artifact_scope.description: Scoped artifact identifier shared by all compared assessments (e.g. a PR number, issue number, or workflow run ID).

threshold.description: Minimum number of distinct claim texts on the same named item required to surface a conflict. Default 2.

conflict_count.description: Number of named items with conflicting claims in this record.

conflicts.description: Per-item conflict details. Empty when conflict_count is 0.

item_name.description: The named item on which agents disagree (e.g. "AuthService", "latency").

claims.description: All diverging claims from different agents for this item.

item_name.description: Name of the item being assessed.

claim.description: The agent's claim about this item.

agent_id.description: Identifier for the agent run that produced this claim.
